# System Testing Checklist: Online Chat Server MVP

**Purpose**: To verify all core functional, non-functional, and advanced requirements of the Online Chat Server prior to production release.
**Created**: 2026-04-18
**Feature**: [constitution-template.md](./constitution-template.md)

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit.checklist` command based on feature context and requirements.

## User Accounts & Authentication

- [ ] CHK001 Verify user self-registration enforces unique emails and immutable usernames without email verification.
- [ ] CHK002 Verify passwords are stored securely via hashing.
- [ ] CHK003 Verify login state persists across browser close/reopen.
- [ ] CHK004 Verify signing out invalidates only the current browser session.
- [ ] CHK005 Verify account deletion perfectly cascades to delete owned rooms, files, and messages.

## Presence & Sessions

- [ ] CHK006 Verify user presence propagates within 2 seconds (latency check).
- [ ] CHK007 Verify "AFK" status strictly applies only after 1 minute of inactivity across *all* open tabs.
- [ ] CHK008 Verify user remains "Online" if active in at least one tab out of multiple open tabs.
- [ ] CHK009 Verify user becomes "Offline" only when all browser tabs for the application are closed.

## Contacts & Friends

- [ ] CHK010 Verify friend requests can be sent, optionally include text, and require confirmation.
- [ ] CHK011 Verify applying a user-to-user ban immediately blocks new messages and freezes existing history to read-only.
- [ ] CHK012 Verify personal messaging is restricted strictly to confirmed friends who haven't banned each other.

## Chat Rooms & Moderation

- [ ] CHK013 Verify public rooms appear in the searchable catalog and can be joined freely.
- [ ] CHK014 Verify private rooms are hidden from the catalog and strictly require invitations.
- [ ] CHK015 Verify Room Admins can successfully ban users, removing their UI access and file access to the room.
- [ ] CHK016 Verify Room Owner cannot leave their own room, they can only delete it.

## Messaging & Attachments

- [ ] CHK017 Verify messages support multiline text, emojis, replies, and max size of 3 KB.
- [ ] CHK018 Verify edited messages visibly display a gray "edited" indicator.
- [ ] CHK019 Verify arbitrary files up to 20 MB and images up to 3 MB can be uploaded via button or copy-and-paste.
- [ ] CHK020 Verify files persist even if the uploader is banned, but the banned user completely loses access.
- [ ] CHK021 Verify infinite scroll reliably handles rendering a chat history exceeding 10,000 messages.
- [ ] CHK022 Verify messages sent to an offline user are persisted and successfully delivered upon their next login.

## Advanced Infrastructure & Federation

- [ ] CHK023 Verify the entire project successfully builds and runs via `docker compose up` from the root directory.
- [ ] CHK024 Verify successful user connection using a third-party Jabber client.
- [ ] CHK025 Verify cross-server federation functions correctly between Server A and Server B.
- [ ] CHK026 Execute load test: 50+ clients on Server A successfully exchanging messages with 50+ clients on Server B.
- [ ] CHK027 Verify Admin UI correctly displays the Connection Dashboard and Federation traffic statistics.

## Notes

- Check items off as completed: `[x]`
- Add comments or findings inline
- Link to relevant resources or documentation
- Items are numbered sequentially for easy reference
